title: Homepage | Seyfarth Shaw LLP
content:
## Pioneers and Pathfinders: Zeynep Ersin & Kevin Young
Meet the new hosts of our podcast, and listen in as they talk with Pioneers and Pathfinders founder and Seyfarth Chair Emeritus Stephen Poor.
Meet the new hosts of our podcast, and listen in as they talk with Pioneers and Pathfinders founder and Seyfarth Chair Emeritus Stephen Poor.

## Seyfarth Kicks Off Sports & Entertainment Practice
Drawing on decades of industry experience, the group supports clients across the full lifecycle of sports and entertainment enterprises.

## Op-Ed Highlights Seyfarth Fight for Home Justice
Seyfarth supports lawsuit in Piedmont, CA, seeking justice for family forced from home and stripped of wealth.
Seyfarth supports lawsuit in Piedmont, CA, seeking justice for family forced from home and stripped of wealth.

## Zeynep Ersin Named a WIPL Innovative Leader
Chief Innovation and Strategic Design Officer Zeynep Ersin received the 2026 Am Law Women, Influence & Power in Law Award for Innovative Leadership - Internal Innovation.

## Seyfarth Wins 2026 Legalweek Tech Award
Our innovative compliance platforms received a 2026 Legalweek Leader in Tech Award for Regulatory, Governance & Compliance Technology.

## Seyfarth Represents Procon Pacific in Sale to Gravis Global
The transaction positions Procon for its next phase of growth within one of North America’s leading bulk transportation packaging platforms.

## Now Available! 2026 Real Estate Market Sentiment Survey
Our 11th edition is more in-depth than ever, with multi-year trend analysis included throughout to provide a clearer view of the forces shaping today’s CRE market.

## Seyfarth Accelerates Transactions Through Hebbia AI Partnership
Firm expands use of Hebbia’s AI platform, Matrix, to speed diligence, improve deal execution, and enhance analysis.
